purpose: VS Code adapter for the AI Understanding subsystem. Registers five commands (aiuInit, aiuStatus, aiuRefresh, aiuInstallHook, aiuUninstallHook), owns a left-aligned status bar item, and keeps the AIU block in CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md in sync via a debounced workspace watcher.
invariants: Status bar item is hidden when no workspace folder is open; otherwise always visible with current status text.
AIU block is only written to agent target files that already exist — the AI_CTX path owns first-time CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md creation.
When AI_UNDERSTANDING/ does not exist (uninitialized), the AIU block is cleared from agent target files instead of written.
File watcher events are coalesced via 250ms debounce so a burst of saves only triggers one refreshStatus.
Failures in injection sync are caught and logged — they never break the status bar or the command surface.
gotchas: createFileSystemWatcher uses **/* — VS Code's default file watcher excludes (node_modules, etc.) keep this affordable.
The injection sync writes through inject.injectMarkedBlock which is now idempotent — that is what prevents a watcher feedback loop.
cmdInit refuses without a {modal:true} confirm when AI_UNDERSTANDING/ already exists — re-bootstrap is destructive (overwrites all skeleton entries).
hookSourcePath() resolves to <ext-install>/cli/aiu-precommit.js; the file must exist or hook install throws.
